refnamediv.refpurpose: The type representing spatial features with planar coordinate systems.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: geometry is a fundamental PostGIS spatial data type used to represent a feature in planar (Euclidean) coordinate systems.
All spatial operations on geometry use the units of the Spatial Reference System the geometry is in.

refsection.title: Casting Behavior
refsection.para: This table lists the automatic and explicit casts allowed for this data type:
